name: Prawn Mix
steps: Blitz all the ingredients apart from Spring Onion and Turnips until smooth and voluptuous.
Add the Spring Onion and Turnips to the mix.
Put in piping bag, and cut it so that the hole is about 1 inch diameter.
On a tray lined with parchment paper, pipe into 18g cylinder of mix, you can cut the mix with a pair of scissors, think of this like churros.
You can also do it straight into oil if needed.
You can freeze it now for a bit so it holds its shape, and then fry it at 160C for 3-4 minutes.
